summary: Rewrote Table.js from scratch with a fundamentally different architecture. Key changes: (1) Removed <colgroup> entirely — widths are now set directly on th/td via JS style properties, which is the only reliable way to drive sticky positioning. (2) New pixel-accurate width management: locked columns (select=52px, action=130px) get explicit pixel widths; all other columns start at 0 and are filled by autoSize. (3) Fixed right-sticky: totalRightLockedWidth now includes the scrollbar width so CONTROL always has breathing room. Also includes scrollbar in recomputeStickyMeta. (4) Fixed z-index for right-sticky: uses separate counter `ri` so CONTROL (leftmost right-locked) gets highest z-index. (5) Removed `clip-path` hack — scrollbar is baked into totalRightLockedWidth. (6) AutoSize now guards against locked columns and only runs once. (7) Removed orphan CSS classes from Table.css. Badge.css pill variant added. Profiles.js column specs fixed per user requirements.
current_status: Table.js fully rewritten. No linter errors. Column specs updated in Profiles.js. Badge pill CSS added. Ready for runtime testing.
